# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/* Plugin Name: User Authentication */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit; // Exit if accessed directly.
}

add_action('init', 'user_auth_register');
add_action('authenticate', 'user_auth_login');

function user_auth_register() {
    register_post_type(
        'users',
        array(
            'labels' => array(
                'name' => __('Users'),
            ),
            'public' => false,
            'has_archive' => false,
            'supports' => array(),
        )
    );
}

function user_auth_login($user) {
    global $wpdb;

    $attempt = $wpdb->get_row(
        $wpdb->prepare(
            "
            SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->users}
            WHERE username = %s AND password = %s
            LIMIT 1
            ",
            $user->username,
            password_hash($user->password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT)
        )
    );

    if (!is_wp_error($attempt)) {
        $user->roles = array('subscriber'); // Set a default role for new users.
        wp_set_current_user($attempt->ID);
        return $user;
    }

    return new WP_Error('invalid_password', __('Invalid password.'));
}
